## Today's Talk

-   Introducing Stephen Thompson

## Introducing Stephen

-   Senior Research Software Engineer Since October 2023

-   Background in augmented reality for keyhole surgery.

-   informus, education, EMAP, sense-base.

## Workshop Format

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://github.com/stata-translations/Stata2R/blob/main/docs/workshop.md#workshop-format" allowtransparency="true" width="100%" height="100%" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
